summary: Video. A clip from 'The Charlie Kirk Show' (Real America's Voice) featuring a call-in interview with DHS Secretary Kristi Noem alongside an on-screen news headline about ICE arresting a person described as an illegal alien convicted pedophile found living inside a California daycare. It is a talk-show interview segment with broadcast graphics and chyrons.
notable_text: THE CHARLIE KIRK SHOW / REAL AMERICA'S VOICE / ON THE PHONE SEC. KRISTI NOEM, Secretary, Department of Homeland Security / 'SANCTUARY STATE CALIFORNIA: ICE ARRESTS ILLEGAL ALIEN CONVICTED PEDOPHILE FOUND LIVING INSIDE DAYCARE FOR CHILDREN'
